name: cantilever end-load deflection
note: Used as a first-order arm-bending scale check; actual frame layup/joints/motor mount can dominate.

name: cantilever tip-mass first bending frequency proxy
equation: f ~= sqrt((3 E I / L^3) / (0.236 m_beam + m_tip)) / (2 pi)
note: Simple effective-mass approximation for scale comparison with the current resonance parameter.

name: FAA helicopter rotor coning background
note: Coning is driven by the balance between rotor lift and centrifugal force; used as qualitative background only.

name: NASA multicopter blade deflection study
note: Direct small-UAS/multicopter propeller deflection data used as coning-angle magnitude anchors.
